title: Is it possible to lock columns?
excerpt: Is it possible to have a column be locked, no information can be input until a previous column has been completed? We have two date columns and our board is set up in a process order. We want to prevent steps from being …

posts.author: LaurelOnco360 (Laurel)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to have a column be locked, no information can be input until a previous column has been completed? We have two date columns and our board is set up in a process order. We want to prevent steps from being completed out of order.

posts.author: ivanhong-monday.com (ivan-monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @LaurelOnco360!

Ivan here from the monday.com team!

At the moment, it currently isn’t possible to lock a column and have it unlock after the previous column has been completed. I’d love to pass this feedback along to our team for their review and consideration!

Maybe you could add a column description for your date columns to alert users to complete one before the other:

image618×510 20.2 KB

Would this help as a workaround in the meantime?
